title: QuickCMD
description: Ctrl+R to search your chat history. Type to filter, arrows to pick, Enter to use.
body:
Ever typed a long command and needed it again later? Instead of mashing the up arrow, press Ctrl+R in chat to instantly search through everything you've sent — messages and commands. Results update as you type. Works across sessions.

Join my Discord for support (and to support me): https://discord.gg/fdSVNfDUx7

I have more versions than just the ones listed on Versions and if you are using an unsupported version of MC contact me on Discord I'll upload the rest.

Free Minecraft servers: https://elastic.is
